{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192145263235CD236EC3703050"}"},"total":199},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7464505186936587033","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角实力强，非常有个性，给我看爽了，其实还是挺喜欢美国的那个参选者，太帅了，要是放在某些动漫里面，估计就是那种非常理智聪明的反派"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737973977,"group_id":"7255963269448338468","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"各个圈子我无处不在。饭是一点不落，文是一点不看。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UCo+vqqYzS9B1GqD7Sby5f+sSjmpwRaRaP0VmV4noD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7fc24834fc214ebd968c1521b3aa4e4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789033&x-signature=hd%2BU%2BtB5ziQirMAL6r%2B36aATJlU%3D","user_id":"1372606721694008","user_name":"殊秧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1372606721694008","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255963269448338468","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈＋酆都大帝＋无敌＋无女主＋国运＋诡异＋黑手＋桀桀桀】
地府签到五千年，
从一介阴差，摸爬滚打到酆都之主的花无觉。
在5000年签到这一天，系统发放了终极奖励。
【地府五千年打卡成功，发放终极奖励，回家。】
即便已经身为酆都大帝，花无觉依然颤抖的流出眼泪。
随即开通位面通道，一步跨出，回家！
可家乡却与他记忆中已然大不相同…
【欢迎来到规则怪谈！】
【每个国家将挑选一名天选者参加游戏，存活获得奖励，死亡诡异降临。】
【注意，这不是商量，这是通知！】
【桀桀桀，你们，准备好了吗？】
【现在开始挑选…】
【龙国天选者…花？嗯！】
